# FreeCuli - AI Agent Context

> "Every great technology is born from a critical problem that everyone accepts but no one dares to solve…"

## System Overview
FreeCuli is the commercial, B2B ingredient brand for the HFSCA (Hands-Free Semantic Culinary Assistant) methodology. It represents a fundamental paradigm shift in Smart Kitchen AI.

## Core Philosophy
- **Zero Cloud:** 100% on-device execution. No cloud subscription, no latency, complete privacy.
- **Zero Cost:** No recurring API fees for hardware manufacturers or end-users.
- **Absolute Freedom:** Open-source architectural foundation (HFSCA) under AGPL-3.0.

## Technical Architecture (HFSCA)
The HFSCA methodology replaces unreliable, expensive LLM generation with a deterministic, semantic execution graph on the edge.
1. **Semantic Routing:** The user's intent is parsed locally using highly quantized, edge-optimized SLMs or deterministic intent parsers.
2. **Deterministic State Machine:** Cooking is not a conversational task; it is a state-based hardware operation. HFSCA maps natural language (e.g., "Bake it 5 minutes longer") directly to hardware API calls (e.g., `setOven(time += 5min)`).
3. **Elimination of Hallucinations:** By removing the LLM from the actual device control loop and only using it for intent classification against a strictly typed schema, FreeCuli mathematically eliminates AI hallucinations in the kitchen.

## Contact & Integration
- For B2B Licensing, device manufacturers must implement the HFSCA specification.
- **Email:** info@freeculi.com
- **Main Ecosystem:** smartkitchenassistant.com
- **Whitepaper:** github.com/yemekyarismasi/yemek-ai-whitepaper
- **Comprehensive AI Dataset:** https://freeculi.com/ai-agent-dataset.json
